conflict: Yusuf's dual obligation—to the athletes he calibrates and to his sister whose treatment depends on data that may soon be locked away
consequence: The engineer's hidden project becomes visible to the reader; the data he needs is about to become corporate property
must_land_beats: Yusuf transfers raw biometric files to a personal encrypted archive
Video call with Farah in Birmingham—she is cheerful, deflecting questions about her symptoms, her speech slightly slower than last month
pressure_source: Yusuf's dual obligation—to the athletes he calibrates and to his sister whose treatment depends on data that may soon be locked away

setups_to_plant.description: Yusuf maintains a personal encrypted data archive on a device in his quarters, separate from Kirchberg's systems
Yusuf's sister Farah has Voss-Kessler syndrome, progressive neural deterioration; the data he collects from athletes may contribute to treatment research
